title: New CLI Commands and Skills
description: Stream 3 of SDD alignment: Extract sl comment CLI from sl revise, create sl-comment skill, add spike and checkpoint AI commands

title: US1: sl comment list Command
description: WHY: AI agents need to list review comments without launching interactive sessions.

items.item: No auth token exits silently with code 1
Compact mode with truncated previews, counts

design: Files: pkg/cli/comment/types.go, pkg/cli/comment/client.go, pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Extract types and client from pkg/cli/revise/, implement list subcommand with --json and --status flags, token-efficient output (D21).
acceptance_criteria: sl comment list --json outputs valid JSON with comment details

title: US2: sl comment show Command
description: WHY: Agents need full comment details for thread replies to understand context.
design: File: pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Add show subcommand accepting one or more IDs. Fetch full comment with thread replies. Implement --json output with full content.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment show returns full content with all thread replies

title: US3: sl comment reply/resolve Commands
description: WHY: Developers need to respond to and close comments for reviewer tracking.
design: Files: pkg/cli/comment/client.go (add CreateReply method), pkg/cli/commands/comment.go (add reply, resolve subcommands). POST to PostgREST for replies. Cascade resolve for parent to thread replies.

title: US4: sl-comment Skill
description: WHY: Agents need guidance on when/how to use sl comment commands.
design: File: pkg/embedded/skills/sl-comment/skill.md. Follow sl-issue-tracking pattern. Document when to use each subcommand, JSON parsing examples, reply/resolve workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Skill loads and provides actionable guidance

title: US5: spike AI Command
description: WHY: Developers need time-boxed exploratory research with structured output.
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.spike.md. Research spike with timebox. Output: specledger/<spec>/research/yyyy-mm-dd-<topic>.md. Sections: Findings, Decisions, Recommendations.

title: US6: checkpoint AI Command
description: WHY: Developers need to verify implementation progress and log sessions.
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.checkpoint.md. Implementation verification + session log. Verify tests pass, note uncommitted changes, summarize progress.
acceptance_criteria: Session log updated with completed items

title: Extract comment types from revise package
description: WHY: Comment types need to be in a dedicated package for reuse by sl comment CLI.
design: Extract ReviewComment, ThreadReply, ReplyMap from pkg/cli/revise/types.go to pkg/cli/comment/types.go. Update imports in revise package.

title: Extract comment client from revise package
description: WHY: Comment client methods need to be reusable by sl comment CLI.
design: Extract FetchComments, FetchReplies, GetProject, GetSpec, GetChange from pkg/cli/revise/client.go to pkg/cli/comment/client.go. Keep auth retry logic.
acceptance_criteria: Client methods work in new location

title: Implement sl comment list subcommand
description: WHY: Agents need to list comments without interactive session.

items.item: --json flag produces valid JSON, --status open returns only open comments, --status resolved returns only resolved, Auth failure exits code 1 silently, Compact output 80-char truncation, Counts shown instead of full data

design: File: pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Create list subcommand with --json, --status (open/resolved/all), --branch flags. Implement token-efficient compact output (D21).
acceptance_criteria: sl comment list returns JSON array

title: Update revise imports to use comment package
description: WHY: Revise package should use extracted comment types/client.
design: Update pkg/cli/revise/types.go and pkg/cli/revise/client.go to import from pkg/cli/comment/. Remove duplicated code.

title: Implement sl comment show subcommand
description: WHY: Agents need full comment details with thread replies for context.

items.item: Single ID shows comment with replies
Multiple IDs show all in sequence

design: File: pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Add show subcommand accepting one or more IDs. Fetch full comment with replies. Support --json output.
acceptance_criteria: sl comment show returns full content

title: Add CreateReply method to comment client
description: WHY: Need to POST replies to comment threads via PostgREST.
design: File: pkg/cli/comment/client.go. Add CreateReply(parentID, content string) method. POST to /rest/v1/thread_replies. Return created ThreadReply.

title: Implement sl comment reply subcommand
description: WHY: Developers need to respond to comments from CLI.
design: File: pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Add reply subcommand: sl comment reply <id> "message". Support --json output with reply_id and timestamp.

title: Implement sl comment resolve subcommand
description: WHY: Developers need to mark comments as resolved from CLI.
design: File: pkg/cli/commands/comment.go. Add resolve subcommand: sl comment resolve <id> [<id>...]. Use ResolveCommentWithReplies from client for cascade. Support --json output.

title: Create sl-comment skill markdown file
description: WHY: Agents need guidance on when/how to use sl comment commands.

items.item: Decision criteria for list vs show

design: File: pkg/embedded/skills/sl-comment/skill.md. Follow sl-issue-tracking pattern. Document when to use each subcommand, decision criteria, JSON parsing examples.

title: Create spike AI command template
description: WHY: Developers need structured exploratory research with findings captured in a structured format.

items.item: Findings section present, Decisions section present, Recommendations section present, Unique filename (yyyy-mm-dd-<topic>.md)

design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.spike.md. Research spike command. Output: specledger/<spec>/research/yyyy-mm-dd-<topic>.md. Required sections: Findings, Decisions, Recommendations.

title: Create checkpoint AI command template
description: WHY: Developers need to verify progress and log sessions.

items.item: In-progress tasks checked, Tests verified (go test ./... exit 0), Uncommitted changes noted, Summary shows accomplishments

design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.checkpoint.md. Implementation verification + session log. Verify tests pass, note uncommitted changes, summarize progress.
acceptance_criteria: Session log updated with completed items

title: Update clarify command to use sl comment list
description: WHY: Clarify should use new sl comment CLI instead of sl revise --summary.
design: File: .claude/commands/specledger.clarify.md. Replace 'sl revise --summary' with 'sl comment list --status open --json'. Update instructions to use 'sl comment reply' and 'sl comment resolve'.
